name: Http.Parser

unions.name: Error
unions.comment: Represent an unexpected error while trying to parse or decode some part of the message

aliases.name: Request
aliases.comment: Represent a parsed request with a parameterized body type
aliases.type: { method : String, uri : String, headers : Dict String String, body : body }

values.name: expect
values.comment: Chain a request parser to some body decoder
values.type: (Request String -> Result Error (Request a)) -> Result Error (Request String) -> Result Error (Request a)

values.name: json
values.comment: Decode the body of some previously parsed request expecting a json string and a Content-Type header with value "application/json"
values.type: Decoder a -> Request String -> Result Error (Request a)

values.name: mapResult
values.comment: Map a result error and ok cases in a single expression
values.type: (x -> y) -> (a -> b) -> Result x a -> Result y b

values.name: request
values.comment: Parse a request message into a request representation
